calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Set For Trial On Aug-09-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Continued To Aug-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
SONIA JACOB,INTERNING LAW STUDENT for Defendant/Appellant CCSF
with RICK SHEINFIELD, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY supervising
DAVID SCOTT NALE Plaintiff/Respondent

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

DAVID SCOTT NALE testifies on his own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
1- Packet of documents beginning with letter from Mr. Nale to Sara Vellve dated 7/13/07
2- Notice of Planning Dept Requirements, to David S. Nale dated 9/6/07
3- Time Accounting Cost Report 5/1/07-11/4/11
4- Packet of documents and Letter from Tex Ritter to Rachna Rachna dated 9/27/07
in addition the plaintiff/respondent used some posterboard mounted charts as demonstrative evidence.

Witness RACHNA RACHNA testifies on behalf of CCSF.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
A- Notice of Violation, San Francisco Planning Dept dated 5/30/07
B- Letter from San Francisco Planning Dept dated 1/27/12
C- Time Accounting Costs 5/1/07-11/4/11

Witness KEITH DEMARTINI testifies on behalf of CCSF.

Court hears closing arguments.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT reported (Dept.608).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Judgment Entered
